headline: STB won’t open new probe of CPKC rail service on West Coast-Southeast intermodal shortcut
summary: Federal regulators denied requests from Norfolk Southern and Union Pacific to investigate service issues on a key rail route between the West Coast and Southeast. The post STB won’t open new probe of CPKC rail service on West Coast-Southeast intermodal shortcut appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Broader Analyst Sentiment Remains Bullish on Union Pacific (UNP) Amid Norfolk Merger
summary: Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) stands among the 13 unrivaled stocks of the next 10 years, supported by its vast rail network, which underpins U.S. freight transportation and connects major industrial, agricultural, and consumer supply chains. Investor views on Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP)’s long-term prospects are still shaped by the company’s strategic positioning. Despite mixed longer-term […]
